title: Goethalsia meiantha

This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects that help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Goethalsia meiantha include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Goethalsia meiantha is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, particularly those related to the respiratory and immune systems.
